data.title: sprint-next-batch.sh: closed deps default to 'open' in status map after 2242-d974 fix
data.description: When ticket list --status=open,in_progress is used to build the ticket_status_map, closed tickets are not in the map. The dependency lookup defaults to 'open' for missing keys, making closed dependencies appear as open blockers. This causes all stories with depends_on to be permanently blocked once their dependency is closed. The fix: change the default in ticket_status_map.get(target_id, 'open') from 'open' to 'closed' — a ticket not in the open/in_progress list is almost certainly closed.
